Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: crosses (motifs) [300010044], motifs [300009700], design elements (attributes) [300009699], Design Elements (hierarchy name) [300123558], Physical Attributes Facet [300264087]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Crosses in the form of the letter X, used as a heraldic symbol in the form of a diagonal cross or letter X and as a symbol for Saint Andrew, who is said to have been martyred on such a cross.

Source.Source_ID: 2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Cruces con la forma de la letra X.
Kruisen in de vorm van de letter X.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)
2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)
2000020951/Ware and Stafford, Illustrated Dictionary of Ornament (1974)
2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)
2000049657/Fleming and Honour, Diccionario de Artes Decorativas (1987)
2000051224/Fleming y Honour, Diccionario de Artes Decorativas (1987)
2000049125/Pérez Montás, La platería de la Catedral de Santo Domingo (1993)
2000051227/Pérez Montás, La platería de la Catedral de Santo Domingo, primada de América (1993)
2000051231/The Oxford- Duden Pictorial Spanish and English Dictionary (1995)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: sheng an de lu shi zi jia
shèng ān dé lǔ shí zì jià
sheng an te lu shih tzu chia
